introSection: Jet Star 2 is a steel roller coaster located at Vaikų Pasaulis in Elektrenai, Lithuania. The ride was previously located at Gorky Park, but when it existed there is not known.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Although this ride had multiple trains when it opened, only one was in operation when it closed.

fullText:
Jet Star 2 is a steel roller coaster located at Vaikų Pasaulis in Elektrenai, Lithuania. The ride was previously located at Gorky Park, but when it existed there is not known.



Although this ride had multiple trains when it opened, only one was in operation when it closed.


 * Youtube video confirming closure
